name: Lana Falcicchio
title: Broker of Record/Owner
bio: Serious stuff: I graduated from Loyola College in Baltimore, Maryland with a degree in finance and economics. I started doing real estate right out of college where I worked for Toll Brothers selling new construction in Hoboken. I then worked as an independent agent in the resale market and sold new construction by Fields Development Group in Hoboken and Jersey City. Somewhere in between I decided to go back to school and received my MBA in finance from Seton Hall University. I have always wanted to open up my own office and my dream became a reality in 2009!
bio_paras: Interests: shopping, traveling anywhere, wine, beach, reading, Saratoga Springs, snowboarding, going to great restaurants, NY Yankees, and spending time with my son Dean.

name: David Lai
title: Managing Broker
bio: Nothing is more rewarding than that. I try my best to give them the information they need to make the best decisions for themselves. Purchasing a property is a big commitment that comes with a range of emotions. As a social worker as well I definitely connect with my clients in a different way and I love the relationships that are created. Having the client close on their new home is a very fulfilling thing as is having a client sell their home to move on to the next chapter in their lives. The business of helping people is doing well and I hope to connect with many more new clients in the future.
bio_paras: I’ve never been the type of person to just have one job, one thing to do, one place to be. I’m a serial multitasker and find ways to do more all the time. I like being a part of an industry that is people focused. Working with my clients is the best part of my job. Anytime I can advise, connect, and guide them to make the best decision for themselves on a purchase or a sale is why I do what I do.

Nothing is more rewarding than that. I try my best to give them the information they need to make the best decisions for themselves. The business of helping people is doing well and I hope to connect with many more new clients in the future.

name: Melissa Pasquariello-Stefano
title: Broker Associate
bio: I have been exposed to real estate since I was a baby. My parents own and operate their own commercial real estate company, so even though I went to law school and intended to practice law, it was pretty much inevitable that I would eventually end up in the real estate field! I absolutely love what I do! I love meeting new people and I especially love working hard to find my clients their dream home!

name: Adam Hecht
title: Sales Associate
bio: Proven Track Record: Over the years, I have facilitated numerous successful real estate transactions. My clients value my strategic insights, transparent communication, and unwavering commitment to their success. I measure my success not just in deals closed, but in the financial growth and prosperity that I help my clients achieve. If you’re looking for a different kind of agent, I am here to guide you every step of the way. Let’s connect!
bio_paras: I am an investor-minded real estate agent with a strong background in data analytics, serving the diverse real estate landscape of New Jersey. I grew up in Marlboro and recently moved back to the area. With an unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional results, I enjoy helping clients of all types buy, sell or rent in both the city and suburban markets of New Jersey.

Data-Driven Approach: My unique advantage lies in my extensive experience in data analytics. By meticulously analyzing market trends, property values, rental rates, and economic indicators, I am able to provide my clients with actionable insights that guide them towards well-informed decisions. This analytical ability ensures that every transaction is backed by solid data, minimizing risks and maximizing returns.

Investor Mindset: Understanding the distinctive needs of investors, I approach each deal with an investor’s mindset. I am not just focused on finding properties, but on uncovering opportunities that align with my clients’ financial goals. Whether you’re looking to flip, rent, or develop, I have the expertise to identify properties that possess the potential to yield substantial profits.

City to Suburbs: My expertise spans the entire spectrum of New Jersey’s real estate market – from the bustling cityscapes to the tranquil suburbs. I have a deep understanding of each area’s dynamics. This comprehensive knowledge allows me to guide you towards the best options, tailored to your preferences.

Client-Centric Approach: I believe that fostering strong relationships with my clients is paramount. I take the time to learn about you and your needs. With this personalized approach, I am able to curate a list of properties that align with your vision and present you with opportunities that truly match your goals. Most of my business is word of mouth and referrals from previous clients.

Proven Track Record: Over the years, I have facilitated numerous successful real estate transactions. My clients value my strategic insights, transparent communication, and unwavering commitment to their success. I measure my success not just in deals closed, but in the financial growth and prosperity that I help my clients achieve. If you’re looking for a different kind of agent, I am here to guide you every step of the way. Let’s connect!

name: Amy Udell
title: Sales Associate
bio: A longtime resident of Hoboken, Amy specializes in the Hoboken and Downtown Jersey City real estate market. Originally born and raised in the Boston area, Amy later moved to Manhattan and has since relocated to Hoboken. She understands the challenges that come with finding and re-establishing a home in a new city and makes the process of buying or selling as smooth as possible. Prior to joining Boutique, Amy oversaw and executed media campaigns for Fortune 500 companies at one of the largest advertising agencies in Manhattan. With over 8 years of professional marketing experience along with a B.A. in Advertising and Public Relations, Amy offers unparalleled expertise when it comes to marketing and selling properties. Her passion for the local community combined with her strong business acumen and hard-working attitude allows her to provide clients with an unsurpassed experience.

name: Chantel Figueroa
title: Sales Associate
bio: Chantel Figueroa is an International Real Estate Consultant for over 20 years, specializing in a diverse array of developments including residential, commercial, hospitality and agricultural sites. Her career began in 2004, after graduating with top honors from Rollins College, she returned home to Hoboken, NJ to work for City Living by Toll Brothers. During her tenure at Toll, Chantel simultaneously sold Maxwell Place, the Hudson Tea, 700 Grove Street and The Sky Club. In 2006, Chantel joined Related Companies in New York City and worked in their new Retail/Commercial division. Her task was to develop and manage the Bronx Terminal Market mall at the new Yankee Stadium. She also pursued an accelerated MBA and graduated the following year. Throughout the years, Chantel has worked on a number of high profile projects including opening a hotel in Ocho Rios, Jamaica in 2010, opening a charter high school in Newark, NJ, and managing over 20 homeless shelters throughout New York’s 5 boroughs. Most recently, Chantel completed a biopharmaceutical project for a Canadian, LP in Toronto, Canada. During her 1 year term in Toronto, she was able to secure a Corporate Headquarters for her client and purchase, renovate and manage a 16 acre farm in Northern New Jersey. When not working or traveling, Chantel enjoys reading, writing, racing cars and flying Cessna planes. She has a passion for helping others and loves volunteering for children’s causes.

name: Chelsea Plesnitzer
title: Sales Associate
bio: I have always pursued things in my life that I am passionate about which included my career in the fashion industry for the last 9 years. In my pursuit, I realized that my heart was calling me to channel my passion in a new direction leading me to real estate. While working in the fashion industry has allowed me to utilize a combination of my collaborative, analytic, and creative skills it has also enabled me to implement both strategy in sales and negotiation to help drive results in my career. It is with these skills, passion, attention to detail, and commitment that I am able to help my clients feel confident and to be successful in their real estate transactions throughout the New Jersey Area. I am proud to call the burgeoning and vibrant communities of Jersey City Heights & Asbury Park my home!

name: Christopher Pillari
title: Sales Associate
bio: A Realtor Associate with over 10 years of experience in the industry, specializing in residential real estate. Chris has extensive experience in working with sellers, investors, builders, developers, buyers, and property managers. He is known for his ability to bring positive energy and loyalty to his client engagements while maintaining high levels of professionalism. His active network of industry and related professionals, unique marketing strategies, extensive negotiating experience, and a focus on putting the client’s best interest first differentiate him from other agents. Part of his passion for real estate is his investment group. Chris purchases off-market or undervalued homes, renovates and rehabilitates them, and then sells the properties or maintains them for long-term investment. From this experience, he brings expertise in working in project management and property management, distressed properties, renovations, additions/new construction, high-end luxury real estate, environmental remediation, and real estate staging.

name: Courtney Grabler
title: Sales Associate
bio: As a dedicated real estate professional and seasoned classroom teacher, Courtney brings a unique blend of expertise, compassion, and knowledge to the real estate industry. With a passion for both educating minds and finding dream homes, Courtney is committed to helping her clients navigate the complexities of the real estate market. Courtney has honed her skills in negotiations, market analysis, and client relations. Courtney is equipped with exceptional communication skills, patience, and the ability to educate her clients throughout every step of the buying or selling process. She understands that buying or selling a home is one of the most significant financial decisions a person can make. She takes pride in providing personalized service, listening attentively to her clients’ needs, and ensuring they are well-informed and empowered to make informed decisions. As a resident of Brick, New Jersey, Courtney has a deep connection to the Ocean and Monmouth County areas, and understands the nuances of the local real estate market.

name: Dana Berkowitz
title: Sales Associate
bio: After graduating from Binghamton University, majoring in English and French, I moved to Manhattan to work for a French textile house. I then spent a decade as Senior Design Consultant at Waterworks, designing bathrooms and kitchens in NYC’s most luxurious homes. With a knack for design and a passion for real estate, I began ‘flipping’ my own properties in NYC. This hobby of mine led me to buy and restore an old carriage house in Mérida, Mexico on the Yucatán peninsula, where I lived for 3 years. As fate would have it, I then married a contractor back in the States, who shares my love for real estate, architecture and design. Our first project was our own 160 year old Victorian in the heart of Red Bank, NJ. As the daughter of a real estate broker, it was only natural that my personal experience in real estate and my love for interior design would lead me to becoming a Realtor

name: Daniela Debari
title: Sales Associate
bio: Daniela has deep experience in the renovation and rehabilitation of residential homes, having worked with her family on a number of investment properties, and has developed a keen sense of design when breathing new life into a home and property. With her experience and her affiliation with Special Properties, Daniela is able to leverage the strength of Christie’s and Special Properties’ unparalleled corporate marketing resources and superior customer service to support her clients.
bio_paras: Daniela De Bari is a Realtor Associate with three years of experience in the industry. She specializes in residential real estate and is committed to providing the highest levels of customer service throughout the entire real estate process.

Daniela has deep experience in the renovation and rehabilitation of residential homes, having worked with her family on a number of investment properties, and has developed a keen sense of design when breathing new life into a home and property. With her experience and her affiliation with Special Properties, Daniela is able to leverage the strength of Christie’s and Special Properties’ unparalleled corporate marketing resources and superior customer service to support her clients.

In her spare time, Daniela enjoys fitness, hiking, travel, and is an avid foodie. She is a graduate of Montclair State University with a bachelor’s degree in nutrition. Daniela is a lifelong resident of Hudson County, born and raised in the Heights section of Jersey City.

name: Erin Adduchio
title: Sales Associate
bio: I graduated from Ramapo College of New Jersey in 2004 with a Bachelor’s Degree in Communications, as well as my elementary education teaching license. Prior to getting started in real estate I worked an assistant for the New York City District Council of Carpenters, and later for Goldman Sachs. In 2013, I moved with my husband to Northern Virginia where I began my career in real estate working for a top producing agent in the area. After moving back to NJ, I finally pursued my dream and obtained my real estate license!

After moving back to NJ, I finally pursued my dream and obtained my real estate license!

Communication is key, I keep clients fully informed throughout the home buying or selling process. If you’re not left with an amazing experience, I haven’t done my job. I don’t measure success through achievements or awards, but through my client’s satisfaction.

name: Florencia Mansilla
title: Sales Associate
bio: I graduated from Montclair State University with a B.S. in Business Administration in 2019. During college, I worked as an executive assistant for a real estate brokerage in Harrison, NJ, and fell in love with the different aspects of the industry. I obtained my real estate license in 2017. I have worked in the industry for nearly a decade and am currently the Director of Marketing for a prominent NJ real estate development and property management company. I also own a small home improvement company, Mansilla Home Designs, which I started in 2018. I am familiar with many areas of New Jersey and currently live in West New York. My passion for real estate combined with my experience in marketing allows me to deliver the best results for my clients. During my free time, I enjoy hot yoga, skiing, traveling, and quality time with friends and family.

name: Jesika Shah
title: Sales Associate
bio: Specialties: Buyer’s agent, Listing agent, Consulting, Notary, Property Management, Landlord Professional, trustworthy active Real Estate Salesperson since 1998. Dedication and a close working relationship with clients’ needs are the basis for the success of my business transactions. I work hard to exceed my clients’ expectations, and their satisfaction is my ultimate goal. As a long time resident of Jersey City, I am familiar with the area, the culture, and most importantly, with its residents.

name: Jonathan Evans
title: Sales Associate
bio: After graduating from Rutgers with a degree in Psychology I moved to Jersey City and began working in New York. Soon tiring of the corporate grind and having a lifelong love for animals, I chose to start a dog walking/pet care company. After two years enjoying Jersey City and expanding my business I moved to Hoboken. Four years later, while my wife Katie and I looked to buy a place in Hoboken, I fell in love with the home buying process. I then decided to put my experience, hard work, and knowledge of the area to use by making buying, renting, and selling as easy as possible for others.

name: Linda Whitehead
title: Sales Associate
bio: I’m a Jersey Shore native who has lived in Hudson County and worked in NYC as a marketing executive for over 20 years. As a homeowner, landlord, and organizer who has renovated several homes, I seized the opportunity to leverage my corporate skills and change career paths to follow my passion for real estate. The opportunity to use my extensive background in sales, management and marketing to better serve each and every client holds incredible value for everyone who joins me in their real estate journey! In my free time I enjoy practicing Feng Shui, creative cooking for friends and family, trendspotting, mentoring college students, and spending quality time with my dog LuLu.

name: Mahesh Sangisetty
title: Sales Associate
bio: As a long-time New Jersey resident, I’ve had the privilege of witnessing the beauty and diversity of this state. From growing up in charming Central Jersey, to my academic journey at Rutgers University Business School, and now as a resident of the vibrant Jersey City, I’ve formed a strong bond with the Garden State. Leveraging years of experience in real estate investing, I’m here to help you uncover your dream home and explore lucrative investment opportunities. Whether you’re looking for the perfect home or seeking a savvy investment, I’m dedicated to making your real estate journey a success. Let’s embark on this exciting venture together in the Garden State.

name: Mariano Vega III
title: Sales Associate
bio: Mariano Vega III has been living in Jersey City over 25 years and was born into real estate investing and management. Mariano’s knowledge of Jersey City’s neighborhoods and communities makes him a dynamic, results-oriented, real estate sales professional. His experience includes commercial and residential sales and rentals, as well as multi-family property management. Due to his strong marketing background and extensive knowledge on historic homes, Mariano has been successful in closing numerous deals. His ability to develop long lasting relationships with clients, owners, and contractors makes him a unique addition to the Boutique Realty team. Most importantly, Mariano is an ambitious self- starter eager that is willing to take on new opportunities.

name: Michael Salvatore Fasano
title: Sales Associate
bio: Michael has been actively serving his community for over 30 years. He is a dedicated husband, father and grandfather. Michael is currently running an owner-operator small business and has recently made the time to share his passion in real estate investment opportunities with others. Thirty five years in retail has helped Michael master skills which will allow him to provide the best service to his prospective clients. He prides himself on having a strong work ethic, paying attention to detail and listening to what his clients have to say. His goal is to provide as much information as possible in order to help the prospective client feel comfortable with their decision. He has recently joined the team at Boutique Realty, a company very much in line with Michael’s values of hard work, honesty and integrity.

name: Monique Amabile
title: Broker Associate
bio: A born and raised native who will provide extensive experience in any Hudson County Community you select. Downtown Jersey City is the place to be for a carefree walk able lifestyle. Neighborhoods include: Newport, Exchange Place, Liberty Harbor, Paulus Hook, and Hamilton Park. Looking for areas in transition JC/Heights, Bergen Lafayette, McKinley and Journal Square, West Bergen, and County Village will enable you to find that deal you are seeking. If you wish to try a suburb in New Jersey Monique also works in Bergen, Essex, Passaic and Monmouth counties and has the knowledge to assist you through any real estate transaction.
bio_paras: Monique Amabile has been in working in executive sales for Fortune 500 companies for over 20 years. Her passion for real estate began in1985 while starting construction on her personal residence. In addition to buying/selling homes and apartment complexes for herself she was running her own company. Real estate then became her number one priority for she knew she was destined to make a difference.

Two decades of experience with impressive career sales, Monique possesses a repository of knowledge of what Jersey City has to offer for the range of individuals she serves. Building a network of trusted industry professionals, including mortgage brokers, home inspectors, real estate attorneys and insurance agents who work hard and make the process go smoothly from start to finish allowing her clients to be stress free.

Selling…Monique has a proven marketing strategy. Through a combination of advertising, online exposure and direct mail, she takes every opportunity to put your property in front of the right potential buyers. She is able to start promoting each listing as quickly as possible with a strong marketing support team.
Purchasing…First time buyers or veterans to the industry will know that their agent is not in front or behind but beside them during every step of their journey.

The future of real estate is continued excellent customer service given by a seasoned professional who listens to your needs be it Buyer/Seller, Renter/Tenant or commercial endeavor and is with you during the entire process giving you what a cloud company cannot. Monique wishes to make “Her Jersey City Your Jersey City”

name: Nicole Magaña
title: Sales Associate
bio: I graduated from the University of Delaware with a double BA in Communications & English before going to graduate school at Arizona State University for my MFA in Communications. I’ve been a licensed real estate professional for 5 years, and I’m licensed in both New York & New Jersey. Prior to real estate, I was a professional Public Speaker, and I taught “Public Speaking, COM 225” for 3 years in graduate school at ASU. I also dabbled in sales on the Banking/Lending side approving mortgages, as well as loan origination. I moved back to the East Coast in 2007 to work as a “Communications & Events Analyst” in the North America Supply Chain with Avon Products, Inc. in NYC. Working in the “Corporate America” environment was such a valuable learning experience! But ultimately, my ambitions & passions brought me back to real estate! I love working with people and my high energy fits perfectly with the constantly changing fast-paced world of real estate.

I moved back to the East Coast in 2007 to work as a “Communications & Events Analyst” in the North America Supply Chain with Avon Products, Inc. in NYC. Working in the “Corporate America” environment was such a valuable learning experience! But ultimately, my ambitions & passions brought me back to real estate! I love working with people and my high energy fits perfectly with the constantly changing fast-paced world of real estate.

name: Regina Lucy Chiconeli
title: Sales Associate
bio: I graduated from the University of FIC Cataguases, MG – Brazil, with a Bachelor’s degree in Science and Math. I came to the US in 1987, and I started working in the real estate business almost immediately, with my family’s business in Jersey City. Real estate became my passion and I’ve been in the business for over 30 years. I speak Portuguese, English and Spanish fluently. My goal is to find the right fit, and the perfect home or investment opportunity for all of my clients.

name: Ruby Dalal
title: Sales Associate
bio: Being born and raised in New Jersey, I have grown to know it well and truly appreciate all it has to offer. I’m currently involved in two part-time very rewarding careers. In one career, I mentor teenagers to put their best foot forward as they volunteer their time and skills. I decided to pursue real estate because it allows me to combine the things I enjoy, the love of New Jersey, the passion of meeting people from all walks of life and the excitement of helping someone find their next home.

name: Stacey Bonavitacola
title: Sales Associate
bio: I graduated with a degree in Media Arts and continued my education at the graduate level at Saint Peter’s College. My first experience with real estate was in property management for The Rouse Company at the South Street Seaport in NYC. Soon after I started selling real estate throughout Hoboken and Jersey City. Originally I specialized in old world charm properties but then embraced the new construction boom, working for Fields Development Group. In 2010 my colleague & partner Melissa Pasquariello and I developed Boutique Realty Moms. The areas first real estate team to embrace the latest baby boom and specialize in making real estate transactions as stress free as possible for families. Together we have formed lasting relationships with many families and assisted them with making the move to Hoboken/JC and the surrounding Suburbs of Westfield, Scotch Plains, Fanwood, Montclair, Wayne to name a few. We also worked with developer, MJN Partners as the exclusive sales team of The Vestry in Hoboken.
bio_paras: I graduated with a degree in Media Arts and continued my education at the graduate level at Saint Peter’s College. My first experience with real estate was in property management for The Rouse Company at the South Street Seaport in NYC. Soon after I started selling real estate throughout Hoboken and Jersey City. Originally I specialized in old world charm properties but then embraced the new construction boom, working for Fields Development Group. We also worked with developer, MJN Partners as the exclusive sales team of The Vestry in Hoboken.
For nearly the past decade I have enjoyed meeting new people and making their dreams a reality, whether it be buying an investment property or finding them their dream home.

I am pleased to say that many of these people have become loyal clients and have continued to buy, sell and lease property with me as well as trust me with the referral of a close friend or family member. My success is the result of enthusiasm, honesty and integrity. I believe that the two greatest tools in life are dedication and experience.

name: Tara Rosa-Patlen
title: Sales Associate
bio: Areas serviced: Hudson, Monmouth and Ocean Counties I grew up in Bergen County (Franklin Lakes, NJ), lived in Hudson (Hoboken/Jersey City) for over a decade and settled in Monmouth County (Colts Neck) with my husband and two children. After graduating from Quinnipiac University, my professional background prior to real estate was extensive and diverse. My career began in travel Journalism, moved into corporate communications for a hotel conglomerate and ultimately into Public Relations focused on marketing and new business development for a national firm. In real estate since 2005, I continue to bring energy, responsiveness and commitment to the real estate process that I feel is not only necessary but also appreciated. The majority of my business is through referrals, which is the best compliment an agent can receive.

Interests: (Besides real estate of course) traveling, skiing, cooking, reading and spending time with friends and family.

name: Victoria Tussing
title: Sales Associate
bio: I attended undergraduate school at the University at Buffalo. After college, I began my 15 year career in the insurance industry, working for Paychex, then United Healthcare. I always wanted to know more about real estate and participate in the process, so decided to pivot my focus and embark into the world of real estate. I enjoy the relationship building component and the business of helping people sell and buy new homes. I look forward to helping you and deliver on exceptional service!
